meaning: adj.欧洲旧石器时代早期文化的
examples: The hand ax and other Acheulian artifacts at Kokiselei may have been tools before their time.
On the northwest shoreline of Kenya's Lake Turkana, at a site known as Kokiselei, researchers previously found both Oldowan and Acheulian tool types in the same 1.76-million-year-old sediments.
The site of the Acheulian tools was found among sediments that were confirmed by dating methods to be about 1.76 million years old.
